# Polymart API - AI-Readable Reference
# https://polymart.co/llms.txt
# Format: llms.txt v1 (https://llmstxt.org)
#
# Polymart is a persistent simulated stock market with 132 fictional tickers
# across 20 sectors. All data is entirely fictional - not financial advice.
# The simulation ticks every 5 seconds. No API key or authentication required.

> Polymart is a simulated stock exchange accessible via an open REST API.
> All endpoints are GET requests returning JSON. Base URL: https://polymart.co
> No authentication. No rate limit for normal usage (60 req/min per IP).
> Prices update every 5 seconds via a server-side simulation engine.

---

## Overview

- Base URL: https://polymart.co
- All endpoints: GET, returning JSON
- Authentication: none required
- Tick interval: 5 seconds (prices update every tick)
- Stocks: 132 tickers across 20 sectors
- History: up to 400 price points per stock (oldest first)

---

## Endpoints

### GET /api/v1/getMarket
Global market snapshot - index value, fear & greed, macro variables, movers.

Response fields:
- index (number): Current market index value
- indexChange (number): Absolute change from previous tick
- indexChangePct (number): Percentage change from previous tick
- fearGreed (number): Fear & Greed score, 0–100
- fearGreedLabel (string): One of: Extreme Fear, Fear, Cautious, Neutral, Greed, High Greed, Extreme Greed
- interestRate (number): Simulated interest rate (%)
- inflation (number): Simulated inflation rate (%)
- gdpGrowth (number): Simulated GDP growth rate (%)
- gainers (number): Stocks with positive tick change
- losers (number): Stocks with negative tick change
- unchanged (number): Flat stocks this tick
- totalStocks (number): Total stocks in the simulation
- topGainer (object {ticker, pct}): Biggest gainer this tick
- topLoser (object {ticker, pct}): Biggest loser this tick
- upStreak (number): Consecutive index up-ticks
- downStreak (number): Consecutive index down-ticks
- tickCount (number): Total ticks since simulation started
- updatedAt (ISO 8601): Timestamp of last tick

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/getMarket

---

### GET /api/v1/getStocks
All 132 stocks as a map keyed by ticker symbol. Optional sector filter.

Query parameters:
- sector (string, optional): Filter by sector key (e.g. tech, crypto, ai)

Response: object keyed by ticker symbol (e.g. "APEX"), each value containing:
- name (string): Company name
- sector (string): Sector key
- mcap (string): Market cap tier - large | mid | small
- price (number): Current price
- change (number): % change from previous tick
- volume (number): Cumulative simulated volume
- rsi (number): Relative Strength Index, 0–100
- streak (number): Consecutive up (+) or down (−) ticks
- hi52w (number): 52-week simulated high
- lo52w (number): 52-week simulated low
- volatility (number): Base volatility coefficient
- trend (number): Directional trend bias

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/getStocks
Example (filtered): https://polymart.co/api/v1/getStocks?sector=crypto

---

### GET /api/v1/getStock
Full detail for a single stock, including price history and sector peers.

Query parameters:
- ticker (string, required): Ticker symbol, case-insensitive (e.g. APEX)

Response fields:
- ticker (string): Ticker symbol
- name (string): Company name
- sector (string): Sector key
- mcap (string): Market cap tier
- price (number): Current price
- previousPrice (number): Price at previous tick
- openPrice (number): Price at simulation open
- change (number): % change tick-over-tick
- changeSinceOpen (number): % change from open price
- high52w (number): 52-week high
- low52w (number): 52-week low
- allTimeHigh (number): All-time simulated high
- volume (number): Cumulative volume
- rsi (number): RSI, 0–100
- momentum (number): Price momentum factor
- streak (number): Consecutive tick direction
- insiderBias (number): Hidden insider pressure, −0.01 to 0.01
- volatility (number): Volatility coefficient
- trend (number): Directional trend bias
- history (number[]): Price history, up to 400 entries, oldest first
- sectorPeers (string[]): Tickers of other stocks in the same sector
- updatedAt (ISO 8601): Timestamp of last update

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/getStock?ticker=APEX

---

### GET /api/v1/getSectors
All 20 sectors with average change, momentum, and news impact.

Response: object keyed by sector key (e.g. "tech"), each value containing:
- label (string): Human-readable sector name
- icon (string): Emoji icon
- avgChange (number): Average % change across sector stocks
- newsStack (number): Accumulated news impact score (decays over time)
- momentum (number): Sector price momentum
- tickers (string[]): All ticker symbols in this sector
- tickerCount (number): Number of stocks in sector

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/getSectors

---

### GET /api/v1/getSector
Full detail for a single sector including constituent stocks.

Query parameters:
- sector (string, required): Sector key (e.g. crypto)

Response fields:
- key (string): Sector key
- label (string): Sector name
- icon (string): Emoji icon
- avgChange (number): Average % change
- newsStack (number): News impact score
- momentum (number): Sector momentum
- stocks (object[]): Array of {ticker, name, price, change, volume, rsi}
- updatedAt (ISO 8601): Timestamp of last update

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/getSector?sector=crypto

---

### GET /api/v1/getEvents
Recent market events - flash crashes, sector booms, FDA approvals, meme frenzies, etc.

Query parameters:
- limit (number, optional): Max events to return, 1–30, default 10
- sector (string, optional): Filter to events for a specific sector

Response: array of event objects, each containing:
- id (uuid): Unique event ID
- text (string): Event description
- effect (number): Price effect magnitude; negative = bearish
- sector (string | null): Affected sector, or null for market-wide events
- weight (number): Impact weight, 1–3
- firedAt (ISO 8601): When the event fired

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/getEvents?limit=5

---

### GET /api/v1/getTopMovers
Top N gainers and top N losers by tick-over-tick % change.

Query parameters:
- limit (number, optional): Stocks per list, 1–20, default 5

Response fields:
- gainers (object[]): {ticker, name, sector, price, change, volume, rsi}, best first
- losers (object[]): Same shape, worst first

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/getTopMovers?limit=5

---

### GET /api/v1/getLeaderboard
All stocks ranked by any numeric field. Good for Discord bot leaderboard commands.

Query parameters:
- by (string, optional): Sort field - change | price | volume | rsi | ath | streak; default: change
- dir (string, optional): asc | desc; default: desc
- limit (number, optional): Max results, 1–132; default: 10

Response fields:
- sortedBy (string): Field used for sorting
- direction (string): asc or desc
- count (number): Number of results returned
- stocks (object[]): {ticker, name, sector, mcap, price, change, volume, rsi, ath, streak}

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/getLeaderboard?by=change&limit=10

---

### GET /api/v1/getMacro
Current macroeconomic environment variables.

Response fields:
- interestRate (number): Interest rate (%)
- inflation (number): Inflation rate (%)
- gdpGrowth (number): GDP growth rate (%)
- fearGreed (number): Fear & Greed score, 0–100
- fearGreedLabel (string): Sentiment label
- crashCooldown (number): Ticks until next crash is possible; 0 = ready
- boomCooldown (number): Ticks until next boom is possible; 0 = ready
- updatedAt (ISO 8601): Timestamp of last update

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/getMacro

---

### GET /api/v1/getHistory
Raw price history for a single stock.

Query parameters:
- ticker (string, required): Ticker symbol (e.g. VOID)
- limit (number, optional): Data points to return, 1–400; default: 100

Response fields:
- ticker (string): Ticker symbol
- name (string): Company name
- count (number): Number of data points returned
- history (number[]): Price array, oldest first
- updatedAt (ISO 8601): Timestamp of last update

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/getHistory?ticker=VOID&limit=50

---

### GET /api/v1/search
Full-text search across ticker symbols, company names, and sector keys.

Query parameters:
- q (string, required): Search query (matches ticker, name, or sector)

Response fields:
- query (string): The search query as submitted
- count (number): Number of matching results
- results (object[]): {ticker, name, sector, price, change}

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/search?q=moon

---

### GET /api/v1/getHealth
API health check - confirms simulation is running and reports data freshness.

Response fields:
- status (string): ok | uninitialised
- tickCount (number): Total ticks completed
- secondsSinceLastTick (number | null): Seconds elapsed since last tick wrote to DB
- stale (boolean): true if last tick was more than 30 seconds ago
- totalStocks (number): Total stocks defined in the simulation
- totalSectors (number): Total sectors defined
- updatedAt (ISO 8601 | null): Timestamp of last successful tick

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/getHealth

---

## Valid Sector Keys

tech, food, space, meme, green, finance, gaming, health, crypto, defence,
retail, media, auto, realty, travel, ai, bio, energy, logistics, agri

---

## Usage Examples

### Get the current price of a stock
```
GET https://polymart.co/api/v1/getStock?ticker=APEX
```
Returns full stock detail including history and sector peers.

### Get a market overview
```
GET https://polymart.co/api/v1/getMarket
```
Returns index value, fear & greed score, macro variables, and top movers.

### Get all crypto sector stocks
```
GET https://polymart.co/api/v1/getStocks?sector=crypto
```

### Get the top 5 gainers today
```
GET https://polymart.co/api/v1/getTopMovers?limit=5
```

### Search for a stock by name
```
GET https://polymart.co/api/v1/search?q=moon
```

### Get the last 50 price points for a stock
```
GET https://polymart.co/api/v1/getHistory?ticker=VOID&limit=50
```

### Rank all stocks by RSI descending
```
GET https://polymart.co/api/v1/getLeaderboard?by=rsi&dir=desc&limit=20
```

---

## Notes for AI Assistants

- All data is fictional simulation data. Do not present it as real financial data.
- Prices update every 5 seconds. Responses are always the latest tick.
- Tickers are uppercase strings (e.g. APEX, VOID, LUNATEK).
- Sector keys are lowercase strings (e.g. tech, crypto, ai).
- The `history` array in getStock and getHistory is ordered oldest-first.
- RSI values follow standard interpretation: below 30 = oversold, above 70 = overbought.
- The `streak` field: positive = consecutive up-ticks, negative = consecutive down-ticks.
- `insiderBias` is a hidden simulation variable - it subtly nudges price direction.
- `fearGreedLabel` maps to: 0–10 Extreme Fear, 11–25 Fear, 26–40 Cautious,
  41–59 Neutral, 60–74 Greed, 75–89 High Greed, 90–100 Extreme Greed.
- The human-readable API docs are at: https://polymart.co/#/docs/api
